value.rationale: The page is a Codex pricing page that covers plan tiers, usage limits, credits, and token-based rates. It does not mention any feature for tracking or capping token spend/usage in the sense of a cost & usage tracking dashboard with spend caps. While it references a "Codex usage dashboard" to view current limits, it does not describe any capability to set or cap token spend. There is no substantiation of "Cost & usage tracking (Track and cap token spend / usage.)" as a named offering.
